procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionHeader_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [Name], [AppId], [Type], [Notes], [Scope], [OverrideID], [QueryTableName], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionHeader_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader] ( [ID] ,[Name] ,[AppId] ,[Type] ,[Notes] ,[Scope] ,[OverrideID] ,[QueryTableName] ) VALUES ( @Id ,@Name ,@AppId ,@Type ,@Notes ,@Scope ,@OverrideId ,@QueryTableName )
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionHeader_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader] SET [Name] = @Name ,[AppId] = @AppId ,[Type] = @Type ,[Notes] = @Notes ,[Scope] = @Scope ,[OverrideID] = @OverrideId ,[QueryTableName] = @QueryTableName WHERE [ID] = @OriginalId AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionHeader_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionHeader_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [Name], [AppId], [Type], [Notes], [Scope], [OverrideID], [QueryTableName], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionHeader]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionSchema_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [SeqNum], [FunctionID], [TravFieldName], [ApiFieldName], [ValueTranslation], [Notes], [FieldSetting], [ChildFunctionID], [QueryColumnName], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionSchema_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema] ( [SeqNum] ,[FunctionID] ,[TravFieldName] ,[ApiFieldName] ,[ValueTranslation] ,[Notes] ,[FieldSetting] ,[ChildFunctionID] ,[QueryColumnName] ) VALUES ( @SeqNum ,@FunctionId ,@TravFieldName ,@ApiFieldName ,@ValueTranslation ,@Notes ,@FieldSetting ,@ChildFunctionId ,@QueryColumnName )
-- Get the identity value SET @Id = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionSchema_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema] SET [SeqNum] = @SeqNum ,[FunctionID] = @FunctionId ,[TravFieldName] = @TravFieldName ,[ApiFieldName] = @ApiFieldName ,[ValueTranslation] = @ValueTranslation ,[Notes] = @Notes ,[FieldSetting] = @FieldSetting ,[ChildFunctionID] = @ChildFunctionId ,[QueryColumnName] = @QueryColumnName WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionSchema_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiFunctionSchema_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [SeqNum], [FunctionID], [TravFieldName], [ApiFieldName], [ValueTranslation], [Notes], [FieldSetting], [ChildFunctionID], [QueryColumnName], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiFunctionSchema]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiInfo_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [SysDb], [Version], [AuthorizeTimeout], [AccessExpireHours], [RefreshExpireDays], [IsDebugLocalEnv], [IgnoreInvalidField], [UseMsgSecurity], [MsgSharedKey], [MsgEncryption], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiInfo] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiInfo_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiInfo] ( [ID] ,[SysDb] ,[Version] ,[AuthorizeTimeout] ,[AccessExpireHours] ,[RefreshExpireDays] ,[IsDebugLocalEnv] ,[IgnoreInvalidField] ,[UseMsgSecurity] ,[MsgSharedKey] ,[MsgEncryption] ) VALUES ( @Id ,@SysDb ,@Version ,@AuthorizeTimeout ,@AccessExpireHours ,@RefreshExpireDays ,@IsDebugLocalEnv ,@IgnoreInvalidField ,@UseMsgSecurity ,@MsgSharedKey ,@MsgEncryption )
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiInfo] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiInfo_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiInfo] SET [SysDb] = @SysDb ,[Version] = @Version ,[AuthorizeTimeout] = @AuthorizeTimeout ,[AccessExpireHours] = @AccessExpireHours ,[RefreshExpireDays] = @RefreshExpireDays ,[IsDebugLocalEnv] = @IsDebugLocalEnv ,[IgnoreInvalidField] = @IgnoreInvalidField ,[UseMsgSecurity] = @UseMsgSecurity ,[MsgSharedKey] = @MsgSharedKey ,[MsgEncryption] = @MsgEncryption WHERE [ID] = @OriginalId AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiInfo] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiInfo_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiInfo] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiInfo_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [SysDb], [Version], [AuthorizeTimeout], [AccessExpireHours], [RefreshExpireDays], [IsDebugLocalEnv], [IgnoreInvalidField], [UseMsgSecurity], [MsgSharedKey], [MsgEncryption], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiInfo]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiUser_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [EmailAddress], [Password], [Name], [Role], [Status], [ResetPassword], [AdditionalInfo], [ExpirationDate], [ClientID], [ClientSecret], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ModifiedBy], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUser] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiUser_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiUser] ( [ID] ,[EmailAddress] ,[Password] ,[Name] ,[Role] ,[Status] ,[ResetPassword] ,[AdditionalInfo] ,[ExpirationDate] ,[ClientID] ,[ClientSecret] ,[DateCreated] ,[DateModified] ,[ModifiedBy] ) VALUES ( @Id ,@EmailAddress ,@Password ,@Name ,@Role ,@Status ,@ResetPassword ,@AdditionalInfo ,@ExpirationDate ,@ClientId ,@ClientSecret ,@DateCreated ,@DateModified ,@ModifiedBy )
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUser] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUser_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiUser] SET [EmailAddress] = @EmailAddress ,[Password] = @Password ,[Name] = @Name ,[Role] = @Role ,[Status] = @Status ,[ResetPassword] = @ResetPassword ,[AdditionalInfo] = @AdditionalInfo ,[ExpirationDate] = @ExpirationDate ,[ClientID] = @ClientId ,[ClientSecret] = @ClientSecret ,[DateCreated] = @DateCreated ,[DateModified] = @DateModified ,[ModifiedBy] = @ModifiedBy WHERE [ID] = @OriginalId AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUser] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUser_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiUser] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiUser_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [EmailAddress], [Password], [Name], [Role], [Status], [ResetPassword], [AdditionalInfo], [ExpirationDate], [ClientID], [ClientSecret], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ModifiedBy], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUser]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserToken_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [UserID], [RefreshToken], [IssueTime], [ExpireTime] FROM dbo.[ApiUserToken] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [UserID] = @UserId ) ORDER BY [UserID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserToken_Insert
procedure.body: INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiUserToken] ( [UserID] ,[RefreshToken] ,[IssueTime] ,[ExpireTime] ) VALUES ( @UserId ,@RefreshToken ,@IssueTime ,@ExpireTime )

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserToken_Update
procedure.body: -- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiUserToken] SET [RefreshToken] = @RefreshToken ,[IssueTime] = @IssueTime ,[ExpireTime] = @ExpireTime WHERE [UserID] = @OriginalUserId

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserToken_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiUserToken] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [UserID] = @UserId

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserToken_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [UserID], [RefreshToken], [IssueTime], [ExpireTime] FROM dbo.[ApiUserToken]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunction_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [UserID], [FunctionID], [AccessExpireDate], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ts], [ModifiedBy] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunction] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunction_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiUserFunction] ( [UserID] ,[FunctionID] ,[AccessExpireDate] ,[DateCreated] ,[DateModified] ,[ModifiedBy] ) VALUES ( @UserId ,@FunctionId ,@AccessExpireDate ,@DateCreated ,@DateModified ,@ModifiedBy )
-- Get the identity value SET @Id = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunction] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunction_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiUserFunction] SET [UserID] = @UserId ,[FunctionID] = @FunctionId ,[AccessExpireDate] = @AccessExpireDate ,[DateCreated] = @DateCreated ,[DateModified] = @DateModified ,[ModifiedBy] = @ModifiedBy WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunction] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunction_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunction] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunction_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [UserID], [FunctionID], [AccessExpireDate], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ts], [ModifiedBy] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunction]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionComp_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [UserFunctionID], [CompID], [Scope], [Filter], [DisplayFilter], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ts], [ModifiedBy] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp] ( [UserFunctionID] ,[CompID] ,[Scope] ,[Filter] ,[DisplayFilter] ,[DateCreated] ,[DateModified] ,[ModifiedBy] ) VALUES ( @UserFunctionId ,@CompanyId ,@Scope ,@Filter ,@DisplayFilter ,@DateCreated ,@DateModified ,@ModifiedBy )
-- Get the identity value SET @Id = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionComp_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp] SET [UserFunctionID] = @UserFunctionId ,[CompID] = @CompanyId ,[Scope] = @Scope ,[Filter] = @Filter ,[DisplayFilter] = @DisplayFilter ,[DateCreated] = @DateCreated ,[DateModified] = @DateModified ,[ModifiedBy] = @ModifiedBy WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionComp_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [UserFunctionID], [CompID], [Scope], [Filter], [DisplayFilter], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ts], [ModifiedBy] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionComp]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionSchema_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [ID], [UserFunctionID], [FieldType], [Notes], [FunctionSchemaID], [CustomFieldName], [ApiFieldName], [Hidden], [DefaultValue], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ts], [ModifiedBy] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [ID] = @Id ) ORDER BY [ID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionSchema_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema] ( [UserFunctionID] ,[FieldType] ,[Notes] ,[FunctionSchemaID] ,[CustomFieldName] ,[ApiFieldName] ,[Hidden] ,[DefaultValue] ,[DateCreated] ,[DateModified] ,[ModifiedBy] ) VALUES ( @UserFunctionId ,@FieldType ,@Notes ,@FunctionSchemaId ,@CustomFieldName ,@ApiFieldName ,@Hidden ,@DefaultValue ,@DateCreated ,@DateModified ,@ModifiedBy )
-- Get the identity value SET @Id = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionSchema_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema] SET [UserFunctionID] = @UserFunctionId ,[FieldType] = @FieldType ,[Notes] = @Notes ,[FunctionSchemaID] = @FunctionSchemaId ,[CustomFieldName] = @CustomFieldName ,[ApiFieldName] = @ApiFieldName ,[Hidden] = @Hidden ,[DefaultValue] = @DefaultValue ,[DateCreated] = @DateCreated ,[DateModified] = @DateModified ,[ModifiedBy] = @ModifiedBy WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema] WHERE [ID] = @Id

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionSchema_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [ID] = @Id AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionSchema_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [ID], [UserFunctionID], [FieldType], [Notes], [FunctionSchemaID], [CustomFieldName], [ApiFieldName], [Hidden], [DefaultValue], [DateCreated], [DateModified], [ts], [ModifiedBy] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionSchema]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionAccess_GetList
procedure.body: SELECT [UserFunctionID], [AccessCount], [FirstAccessTime], [LastAccessTime], [LastAccessMethod], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess] WHERE @ALL=1 OR ( [UserFunctionID] = @UserFunctionId ) ORDER BY [UserFunctionID]

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionAccess_Insert
procedure.body:
INSERT INTO dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess] ( [UserFunctionID] ,[AccessCount] ,[FirstAccessTime] ,[LastAccessTime] ,[LastAccessMethod] ) VALUES ( @UserFunctionId ,@AccessCount ,@FirstAccessTime ,@LastAccessTime ,@LastAccessMethod )
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @Ts = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess] WHERE [UserFunctionID] = @UserFunctionId

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionAccess_Update
procedure.body:
-- Modify the updatable columns UPDATE dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess] SET [AccessCount] = @AccessCount ,[FirstAccessTime] = @FirstAccessTime ,[LastAccessTime] = @LastAccessTime ,[LastAccessMethod] = @LastAccessMethod WHERE [UserFunctionID] = @OriginalUserFunctionId AND [ts] = @Ts
-- Select computed columns into output parameters SELECT @ReturnedTs = [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess] WHERE [UserFunctionID] = @UserFunctionId

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionAccess_Delete
procedure.body: DELETE FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess] WITH (ROWLOCK) WHERE [UserFunctionID] = @UserFunctionId AND [ts] = @Ts

procedure.name: trav_ApiUserFunctionAccess_GetPaged
procedure.body: declare @SQL as nvarchar(MAX) SET @SQL = 'SELECT [UserFunctionID], [AccessCount], [FirstAccessTime], [LastAccessTime], [LastAccessMethod], [ts] FROM dbo.[ApiUserFunctionAccess]' IF LEN(@WhereClause) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' WHERE ' + @WhereClause END IF LEN(@OrderBy) > 0 BEGIN SET @SQL = @SQL + ' ORDER BY ' + @OrderBy END exec sp_executesql @SQL
